fields.title: Inception
fields.synopsis: A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a C.E.O., but his tragic past may doom the project and his team to disaster.
fields.cast: Leonardo DiCaprio, Joseph Gordon-Levitt, Elliot Page, Tom Hardy, Ken Watanabe, Cillian Murphy, Marion Cotillard

fields.title: The Matrix
fields.synopsis: A computer hacker learns from mysterious rebels about the true nature of his reality and his role in the war against its controllers.
fields.cast: Keanu Reeves, Laurence Fishburne, Carrie-Anne Moss, Hugo Weaving, Joe Pantoliano

fields.title: Interstellar
fields.synopsis: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.
fields.cast: Matthew McConaughey, Anne Hathaway, Jessica Chastain, Michael Caine, Matt Damon

fields.title: The Dark Knight
fields.synopsis: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham, Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological and physical tests of his ability to fight injustice.
fields.cast: Christian Bale, Heath Ledger, Aaron Eckhart, Michael Caine, Gary Oldman, Morgan Freeman

fields.title: Pulp Fiction
fields.synopsis: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster and his wife, and a pair of diner bandits intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.
fields.cast: John Travolta, Uma Thurman, Samuel L. Jackson, Bruce Willis, Ving Rhames, Harvey Keitel

fields.title: The Shawshank Redemption
fields.synopsis: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.
fields.cast: Tim Robbins, Morgan Freeman, Bob Gunton, William Sadler, Clancy Brown

fields.title: Forrest Gump
fields.synopsis: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson, the Vietnam War, and other historical events unfold from the perspective of an Alabama man with an IQ of 75.
fields.cast: Tom Hanks, Robin Wright, Gary Sinise, Sally Field, Mykelti Williamson

fields.title: Fight Club
fields.synopsis: An insomniac office worker and a devil-may-care soapmaker form an underground fight club that evolves into something much more.
fields.cast: Brad Pitt, Edward Norton, Helena Bonham Carter, Meat Loaf, Jared Leto

fields.title: Goodfellas
fields.synopsis: The story of Henry Hill and his life in the mob, covering his relationship with his wife Karen Hill and his mob partners Jimmy Conway and Tommy DeVito.
fields.cast: Robert De Niro, Ray Liotta, Joe Pesci, Lorraine Bracco, Paul Sorvino

fields.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
fields.synopsis: Gandalf and Aragorn lead the World of Men against Sauron's army to draw his gaze from Frodo and Sam as they approach Mount Doom with the One Ring.
fields.cast: Elijah Wood, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen, Orlando Bloom, Sean Astin, Andy Serkis

fields.title: The Godfather
fields.synopsis: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his clandestine empire to his reluctant son.
fields.cast: Marlon Brando, Al Pacino, James Caan, Diane Keaton, Robert Duvall

fields.title: Schindler's List
fields.synopsis: In German-occupied Poland during World War II, industrialist Oskar Schindler gradually becomes concerned for his Jewish workforce after witnessing their persecution by the Nazis.
fields.cast: Liam Neeson, Ralph Fiennes, Ben Kingsley, Caroline Goodall, Embeth Davidtz

fields.title: The Silence of the Lambs
fields.synopsis: A young FBI cadet must receive the help of an incarcerated and manipulative cannibal killer to help catch another serial killer.
fields.cast: Jodie Foster, Anthony Hopkins, Scott Glenn, Ted Levine, Anthony Heald

fields.title: Gladiator
fields.synopsis: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family and sent him into slavery.
fields.cast: Russell Crowe, Joaquin Phoenix, Connie Nielsen, Oliver Reed, Richard Harris

fields.title: The Prestige
fields.synopsis: After a tragic accident, two stage magicians engage in a battle to create the ultimate illusion while sacrificing everything they have to outwit each other.
fields.cast: Christian Bale, Hugh Jackman, Scarlett Johansson, Michael Caine, Rebecca Hall

fields.title: Parasite
fields.synopsis: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan.
fields.cast: Song Kang-ho, Lee Sun-kyun, Cho Yeo-jeong, Choi Woo-shik, Park So-dam

fields.title: The Green Mile
fields.synopsis: The lives of guards on Death Row are affected by one of their charges: a black man accused of child murder and rape, yet who has a mysterious gift.
fields.cast: Tom Hanks, Michael Clarke Duncan, David Morse, Bonnie Hunt, James Cromwell

fields.title: Saving Private Ryan
fields.synopsis: Following the Normandy Landings, a group of U.S. soldiers go behind enemy lines to retrieve a paratrooper whose brothers have been killed in action.
fields.cast: Tom Hanks, Matt Damon, Tom Sizemore, Edward Burns, Barry Pepper

fields.title: The Departed
fields.synopsis: An undercover cop and a mole in the police attempt to identify each other while infiltrating an Irish gang in South Boston.
fields.cast: Leonardo DiCaprio, Matt Damon, Jack Nicholson, Mark Wahlberg, Martin Sheen

fields.title: Whiplash
fields.synopsis: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cut-throat music conservatory where his dreams of greatness are mentored by an instructor who will stop at nothing to realize a student's potential.
fields.cast: Miles Teller, J.K. Simmons, Melissa Benoist, Paul Reiser, Austin Stowell

fields.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 1
fields.synopsis: A former assassin seeks revenge against her former allies who betrayed her.
fields.cast: Uma Thurman, Lucy Liu, Vivica A. Fox

fields.title: Fargo
fields.synopsis: A car salesman's desperate scheme leads to murder and chaos in snowy Minnesota.
fields.cast: Frances McDormand, William H. Macy, Steve Buscemi

fields.title: No Country for Old Men
fields.synopsis: Violence and fate collide after a hunter stumbles upon a drug deal gone wrong.
fields.cast: Javier Bardem, Josh Brolin, Tommy Lee Jones

fields.title: Psycho
fields.synopsis: A secretary steals money and ends up at a secluded motel run by a disturbed man.
fields.cast: Anthony Perkins, Janet Leigh

fields.title: Vertigo
fields.synopsis: A detective becomes obsessed with a mysterious woman he is hired to follow.
fields.cast: James Stewart, Kim Novak

fields.title: North by Northwest
fields.synopsis: A man is mistaken for a government agent and drawn into a deadly chase.
fields.cast: Cary Grant, Eva Marie Saint

fields.title: Some Like It Hot
fields.synopsis: Two musicians disguise themselves as women to escape mobsters.
fields.cast: Marilyn Monroe, Tony Curtis, Jack Lemmon

fields.title: The Seven Year Itch
fields.synopsis: A man's temptation grows when his wife leaves town and a blonde moves upstairs.
fields.cast: Marilyn Monroe, Tom Ewell

fields.title: Once Upon a Time in Hollywood
fields.synopsis: A faded TV actor and his stunt double navigate a changing Hollywood in 1969.
fields.cast: Leonardo DiCaprio, Brad Pitt, Margot Robbie

fields.title: Reservoir Dogs
fields.synopsis: After a botched robbery, criminals begin to suspect that one of them is a police informant.
fields.cast: Harvey Keitel, Tim Roth, Michael Madsen

fields.title: The Big Lebowski
fields.synopsis: Jeff Lebowski gets mistaken for a millionaire of the same name and seeks restitution.
fields.cast: Jeff Bridges, John Goodman, Julianne Moore

fields.title: Burn After Reading
fields.synopsis: A disk containing CIA secrets ends up in the hands of two clueless gym employees.
fields.cast: George Clooney, Frances McDormand, Brad Pitt

fields.title: Raising Arizona
fields.synopsis: A childless couple kidnaps a baby and chaos ensues.
fields.cast: Nicolas Cage, Holly Hunter

fields.title: The Birds
fields.synopsis: A coastal town is attacked by aggressive birds for unknown reasons.
fields.cast: Tippi Hedren, Rod Taylor

fields.title: Rear Window
fields.synopsis: A wheelchair-bound photographer spies on his neighbors and suspects murder.
fields.cast: James Stewart, Grace Kelly

fields.title: Strangers on a Train
fields.synopsis: Two strangers agree to swap murders, but one takes the idea seriously.
fields.cast: Farley Granger, Robert Walker

fields.title: Gentlemen Prefer Blondes
fields.synopsis: Two showgirls travel to Paris while navigating love and fortune.
fields.cast: Marilyn Monroe, Jane Russell

fields.title: Niagara
fields.synopsis: A troubled marriage leads to betrayal and murder near Niagara Falls.
fields.cast: Marilyn Monroe, Joseph Cotten

fields.title: Jackie Brown
fields.synopsis: A flight attendant becomes entangled in a dangerous money smuggling scheme.
fields.cast: Pam Grier, Samuel L. Jackson, Robert Forster
